calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition For Order Enforcing Power Of Attorney And For Fees Against Chase Bank For Refusal To Honor Power Of Attorney
Off Calendar Mar-24-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Eliabeth Hanson appeared via zoom for Tedrick Covey (petitioner).

Petition is taken off calendar for lack of showing progress. The matter is ordered off calendar.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Musto. Not reported.

PETITION Petition For Order Enforcing Power Of Attorney And For Fees Against Chase Bank For Refusal To Honor Power Of Attorney
Off Calendar Mar-03-2025 Continued To Mar-24-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION Petition For Order Enforcing Power Of Attorney And For Fees Against Chase Bank For Refusal To Honor Power Of Attorney
Off Calendar Jan-15-2025 Continued To Mar-03-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Elizabeth Hansen for Tedrick Covey, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Christopher Fredrich for JPMorgan Chase Bank, Interested Party (via Zoom).

Mr. Fredrich indicated that JPMorgan Chase Bank is making a special appearance for this hearing, as they have not yet been formally served, but that he and Ms. Hansen have been working together to resolve the matter. Both counsel requested a continuance so they can continue to work towards resolving the matter.

The court continued the matter to March 3, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
